channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Wrestling at Frontwave Arena: a preview with Thunder Rosa
item.description: All Elite Wrestling (AEW) is set to bring an action-packed night to Oceanside's Frontwave Arena on Wednesday, with stars like Thunder Rosa, a trailblazer in women's wrestling, ready to take center stage.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Auriemma and Martelli headline Joe Lapchick Character Award recipients
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Geno Auriemma and Phil Martelli headline this year's recipients of the Joe Lapchick Character Award. Joining the two coaches will be longtime men's basketball official Gene Steratore and former Fordham athletic director Frank McLaughlin.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Vanderbilt guard Mikayla Blakes eager to grow thanks to attention from her record-setting play
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — Vanderbilt freshman Mikayla Blakes knows each time she drops the ball in the basket it will bring more attention. That's what happens when someone scores 53 points, then sets the NCAA freshman single-game scoring record with 55 just 17 days later.
item.dc:creator: TERESA M. WALKER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Aaron Rodgers’ potential landing spots as Jets prepare to move on
item.description: The Aaron Rodgers era in New York has come to a quick and abrupt end. But the veteran quarterback could be a good option for several NFL teams if he decides to return for a 21st season.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Travis Hunter already has coaches and executives convinced he can be two-way player in NFL
item.description: Travis Hunter arrived at the NFL's annual scouting combine with a Heisman Trophy resume, an invitation to work out at two positions and ready to answer any and all questions.
item.dc:creator: Michael Marot, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Chelsea routs Southampton 4-0 on frustrating night for Cole Palmer. Brighton and Palace win
item.description: Chelsea wasn't so reliant on Cole Palmer this time. On a frustrating evening for the England star, his Chelsea teammates stepped up — as demanded by their manager — to share the goals in a 4-0 thrashing of last-place Southampton in the Premier League on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: STEVE DOUGLAS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Galatasaray and Fenerbahce in a spat over Jose Mourinho making allegedly racist comments
item.description: ISTANBUL (AP) — Galatasaray plans to start criminal proceedings against Jose Mourinho and file complaints with soccer's governing body after accusing the Fenerbahce coach of making racist comments after a Turkish league game.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Handwritten love letter from Michael Jordan's high school days hits auction
item.description: A series of rare Michael Jordan items, including a holy grail autographed basketball card and a handwritten love letter, are being auctioned at Leland's Auctions in New York.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, NewsNation

item.title: Handwritten love letter from Michael Jordan's high school days hits auction
item.description: A series of rare Michael Jordan items, including a holy grail autographed basketball card and a handwritten love letter, are being auctioned at Leland's Auctions in New York.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: University of Utah fires head basketball coach Craig Smith
item.description: The University of Utah has fired the head coach of its men's basketball program, Craig Smith. Assistant coach Josh Eilert will take over for the remainder of the season.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Bittan, ABC 4

item.title: Blackhawks organist works his last game after 33 seasons with the team
item.description: Chicago Blackhawks organist Frank Pellico worked his last game with the team on Sunday night after spending 33 seasons with the organization.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Girls Water Polo: Bishop's Schools 10, Carlsbad 8
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- CIF Water Polo Open Division Title came down to the final minute with Bishop's Schools prevailing 10-8 to win the title. For Coach Doug Peabody its 33rd CIF Title that includes boys and girls.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Utah State sweeps San Diego State, 79-71
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - For just the second time first since joining the Mountain West Conference, Utah State sweeps San Diego State. Dexter Akanno scored a career-high 26 points, making 7-of-9 three-pointers to lead the Aggies to a 79-71 win over the Aztecs Saturday night at The Spectrum.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Boys Basketball: Mission Bay 44, Torrey Pines 42
item.description: A big time matchup in boys open division quarters with a #4 and #5 seed matchup, Torrey Pines and Mission Bay.
item.dc:creator: Allison Edmonds, Fox 5

item.title: Thunder cruise past Jazz in first game after break
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Shai Gilgeous-Alexander scored 21 points and the West-leading Oklahoma City Thunder beat the Utah Jazz 130-107 on Friday night for their eighth victory in nine games. Chet Holmgren added 20 points for the Thunder.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Connor McDavid scores in OT to give Canada 3-2 win over United States in 4 Nations Face-Off final
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — When they played “O Canada” for the second time, there were no American fans left in the arena to boo.
item.dc:creator: JIMMY GOLEN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Former NFL player Chris Kluwe arrested while protesting MAGA sign
item.description: Former NFL punter Chris Kluwe, an 8-year NFL veteran who played his entire career with the Minnesota Vikings, took to the podium to voice his opposition to the plaque design.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, NewsNation

item.title: Robot umpires are getting their first MLB test during spring training
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — A computerized system that calls balls and strikes is being tested during Major League Baseball spring training exhibition games starting Thursday after four years of experiments in the minor leagues.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: RSL settles for scoreless draw in Champions Cup opener
item.description: SAN JOSE, Costa Rica (ABC4 Sports) - Real Salt Lake kicked off its 2025 CONCACAF Champions Cup with a scoreless draw against reigning Costa Rican champions CS Herediano in RSL's first Champions Cup game since 2016. "I thought it was a really hard fought game," said RSL head coach Pablo Mastroeni.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: This rookie QB card could be worth $50K if you pull it from a new Topps set
item.description: Denver Broncos rookie quarterback Bo Nix impressed on the field, and now a Colorado sports card store is ready to pay $50,000 to keep a unique card featuring him close to home.
item.dc:creator: Spencer Kristensen, Fox 5

item.title: Padres fans unite to restore North Park mural defaced by Dodgers graffiti
item.description: North Park residents are rallying to restore a beloved San Diego Padres mural in the neighborhood after it was defaced last month with blue spray paint, suggestive of the rival Los Angeles Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5
